## Review Checklist

### For Incident Reports
- [ ] Title follows convention: `Org/Target — Attack Type (TP-YYYY-NNNN)`
- [ ] At least 2 independent sources cited
- [ ] MITRE ATT&CK techniques mapped (where applicable)
- [ ] Threat actor attribution includes confidence level
- [ ] Severity rating justified in the report body
- [ ] No sensitive/embargoed information disclosed prematurely
- [ ] Cross-links to related incidents are bidirectional
- [ ] Added to `incidents/manifest.json`

### For Threat Actor Pages
- [ ] Aliases cross-referenced against vendor taxonomies
- [ ] Attribution confidence uses Admiralty scale
- [ ] Linked incidents are verified and bidirectional
- [ ] Added to `threat-actor-index.json`

### General
- [ ] Uses shared CSS (`assets/incident-report.css`) — no inline styles
- [ ] Renders correctly on mobile (responsive check)
- [ ] No broken links or missing assets
